channel.title: Home
channel.description: Software engineer passionate about building scalable systems and learning new technologies.

item.title: Embedded Network Sniffer (ENS)
item.description: Real-time network packet capture, analysis, and anomaly detection using FreeRTOS on microcontrollers with zero-copy buffer architecture.

item.title: Algorithm Lab
item.description: Educational repository with fundamental algorithms organized by design paradigms: sorting, divide and conquer, and backtracking.

item.title: Bio-Inspired Algorithm Optimization
item.description: Game of Life optimization using Genetic Algorithms and Ant Colony Optimization.

item.title: Stream To Mp3 Tool
item.description: Automation tool to download and listen to your Spotify and YouTube playlists localy.

item.title: Conway's Game of Life: When Four Rules Create Infinite Worlds
item.description: Cellular automata and John Conway's Game of Life.

item.title: Bio-Inspired Algorithms: When Nature Teaches Us How to Think
item.description: Maybe nature has already solved many of our hardest problems.

item.title: Between Machines and Humans: The Transformative Impact of AI
item.description: How artificial intelligence is reshaping society.

item.title: Mr. Big Data Wants To Know About You: The Death of Privacy
item.description: Surveillance capitalism and data exploitation in the digital age.

item.title: Pixels and Stolen Brushes: The Struggle for Creativity
item.description: How generative AI challenges intellectual property and the future of human creativity.

item.title: Beyond Efficiency: AI in Planning and Building Inclusive, Sustainable Cities
Ethics of Care and Digital Technologies: Toward Responsible Innovation
item.description: Ethics of care framework in the digital age.

item.title: The Art of Leadership: To know thyself is the beginning of wisdom
Object-Oriented Programming: Thinking About Systems
item.description: How object-oriented design changed the way I program.
